title: pulmonaria × notha
intro: Pulmonaria × notha, a hybrid of the lungwort plant, is a type of flowering perennial that is native to the UK and other parts of Europe. The medicinal properties of pulmonaria × notha lie in its ability to act as an expectorant, helping to relieve congestion and coughs. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory function, making it useful for individuals suffering from bronchitis and other respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, pulmonaria × notha is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to help alleviate respiratory symptoms and promote overall well-being.
